dashboard.title: Programming learning system administration
dashboard.subtitle: Manage roles, teacher accounts, and access permissions. Students self-register with Gmail; teachers receive accounts created by admins.

teachers.title: Create and manage teacher accounts
teachers.desc: Provide email/password accounts for teachers, track the teacher list, and keep teacher registration admin-only.

teacherGuide.title: Open Python Foundation teacher guides
teacherGuide.desc: Access teacher-facing lesson guides for online or offline instruction.

teachers.title: Provision teacher accounts
teachers.subtitle: Teachers do not self-register. Admins create email/password accounts and hand them to each teacher privately.
teachers.createDesc: The password is shown only once after creation. Send it to the teacher through a secure channel.
teachers.createdSuccess: Teacher account created. Copy the credentials below and send them privately to the teacher.
teachers.listDesc: This list is loaded from Firestore by teacher role.

errors.loadTeachers: Could not load teachers. Check Firestore rules or admin permission.
errors.requiredTeacherFields: Please enter name, email, and password.
